creator: potatosaladx@gmail.com
text:
This patch updates devel/git from 1.5.5 to 1.5.5.1

git 1.5.5 was released May 28, 2008 at http://git.or.cz/

Read the release notes since version 1.5.5:

 * [1.5.5.1] - http://www.kernel.org/pub/software/scm/git/docs/RelNotes-1.5.5.1.txt
 * [1.5.5.2] - http://www.kernel.org/pub/software/scm/git/docs/RelNotes-1.5.5.2.txt
 * [1.5.5.3] - http://www.kernel.org/pub/software/scm/git/docs/RelNotes-1.5.5.3.txt

This patch is based on http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=123318 which fixes the problem where git was unable to find the man pages when using the "--help" switch.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
